description: Keyword → layout-reference file mapping. The Swift `layout-reference` context loader matches the user goal against the `keywords` list (case-insensitive substring match); on hit it injects the `html` file's contents + the companion `notes` markdown as a new context layer. Boosts are additive across multiple hits (boost selects the winning entry when more than one matches). Add a new entry per genre: add a new .html + .md under this directory, then list them here.
